sentence: 有些地方的人喜欢冬天吃狗肉来暖身子。
pinyin: Yǒuxiē dìfang de rén xǐhuān dōngtiān chī gǒuròu lái nuǎn shēnzi.
english: People in some regions like to eat dog meat in winter to warm themselves up.

sentence: 他用拼音输入法打中文，速度越来越快了。
pinyin: Tā yòng pīnyīn shūrùfǎ dǎ Zhōngwén, sùdù yuèláiyuè kuài le.
english: He types Chinese using a pinyin input method, and his speed keeps getting faster.

sentence: 这篇论文通过大量考据证明了那段历史的真相。
pinyin: Zhè piān lùnwén tōngguò dàliàng kǎojù zhèngmíng le nà duàn lìshǐ de zhēnxiàng.
english: This paper used extensive textual research to establish the truth of that period of history.

meaning: (idiom) to achieve sth worthwhile; to make a positive contribution
sentence: 年轻人应该趁早努力，争取在事业上有所作为。
pinyin: Niánqīng rén yīnggāi chènzǎo nǔlì, zhēngqǔ zài shìyè shàng yǒu suǒ zuò wéi.
english: Young people should work hard early on and strive to achieve something meaningful in their careers.

sentence: 他说话总是一套官话，让人听不出真实想法。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà zǒng shì yī tào guānhuà, ràng rén tīng bu chū zhēnshí xiǎngfǎ.
english: He always speaks in bureaucratic language, making it hard to know what he really thinks.
